calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Mar-25-2008 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar Feb-28-2008 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing this day.
Dept. 218, Judge Ollie Marie-Victoire, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Helen Sorep-Matley, CSR 225.
Andrew R. Adler, Esq. appeared for plaintiff Arch Specialty Insurance Company.
Devon Thyme was placed under oath and testified for plaintiff Arch Specialty Insurance Company.
No appearance by Frederick Asche.
Default entered against defendant - 06/08/07.
Doe defendants dismissed today, February 28, 2008.

After hearing the evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the plaintiff Arch Specialty Insurance Company, and against the defaulted defendant Frederick Asche as follows:

Damages/Principal - $1,087,955.22.
Prejudgment Interest - $340,590.49.
Costs - $1,636.00, for a total of $1,430,181.71.

Counsel for plaintiff shall submit proposed judgment to the Court no later than March 4, 2008.
